criteria.reason: Live read-only smoke completed without mutating requests.
First screen now emphasizes immediate operation and collapses detailed context.
Auto-date recovery action is implemented for visible undated items.
Bulk news review includes explicit warning for undated publications.
Bulk skip and move-to-date now require in-page review confirmation.

commands_run: source venv/bin/activate && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_content_plan_generation.py tests/test_content_plan_policy.py
